text: As I move from the hallway into this vibrant exhibit space, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and contemplation. The transition from the silent, sterile corridor to the stimulating R&D display sets my mind alight with questions about the relationship between humans and intelligent machines. The bright colors and informative panels invite me to reflect on the paths of progress and the ethical challenges that arise as our creations become more autonomous. I feel both exhilarated by the innovation showcased and mindful of the responsibilities it entails.
